creator: mjl@luckie.org.nz
text: Oh, for the audit trail, I checked the output of bgpdump -m for http://data.ris.ripe.net/rrc00/2001.06/bview.20010624.1611.gz with and without the patch and can confirm the observation in the bitbucket url.  I time'd bgpdump and it made zero difference in run time (wall, user, sys).
